campaign_status: ARC 1-8 COMPLETE. ARC 9: THE NETWORK (orbital relay — ready to activate). ARC 10: VEL'MORA Phase 1 complete. ARC 11: KAPULUAN — Southern Archipelago contacted, Bakunawa harmonized (Awit ng Tulay, nat 20), Puso ng Dagat (Heart of the Ocean) major node activated, trade accord sealed, all Mythic professions. Zaryth married Sylvara (1255). Baby girl due Reaptide 1256. Lakan-Diwa (Babaylan midwife) at Vel'tarn. Coral basin installed. Level 9. Three apex predators killed. The Velmoran launched.
marriage: Zaryth Vel'quinar married Sylvara Dawnwhisper, 30th Goldmere 1255 AS. The Gardener officiated. 180 guests. Memory tree recorded.
the_velmoran: LAUNCHED. Dragon turtle shell hull + ancient hardwood frame. Autonomous dual-network vessel. Operational.
baby: Girl. Due ~Day 960, Reaptide 1256. Dual-frequency resonance. Lakan-Diwa (primary midwife) + Aldric + Orindel + Seren. Coral basin in family suite. Memory tree recording.
coral_basin: Active in family suite, Vel'tarn. Living coral cutting from Puso ng Dagat. Ocean frequency in the nursery.

monster_kills.old_ashfang: Young Red Dragon CR10. 1 round, 0 damage taken.
monster_kills.maw_of_ashfire: Dragon Turtle CR17. 1 round, 0 damage taken.
monster_kills.the_broodmother: Deep Ankheg CR13. 1 round, 0 damage taken.

ward_status.network: ALL 14 NODES + 7 PLANTINGS ACTIVE. Agricultural ward (Template #3) on Node 7. Root explored — root system spans entire continent + ocean floor to western landmass. Natural Heartstone deposits growing in bedrock (self-sustaining). 412 planting sites identified (Root-prepared).
ward_status.stations: Fenhollow (91%, 8 Heartstones, agricultural ward), Aelindra (58%), Ashara (fortified), Vel'arath (91%, demilitarized, Knowledge Accord)

plantings.stones_memory: The Anvil (D2). Day 92, 1252. 3-mile dome. Stonehearth tending.
plantings.grandmothers_promise: Tidemouth (E26). Day 8, 1253. All 7 Shelf hearthstones synchronized.
plantings.rivers_ear: Listening Dark (underground, 800 ft). Day 164, 1253. Cylindrical dome, 1 mi tunnel.
plantings.crystal_choir: Crystalvein Junction (underground, 600 ft). Day 166, 1253. Crystal-amplified, 2 mi.
plantings.unbroken_dark: Beneath Vel'arath (underground, 1200 ft). Day 168, 1253. 4-mile dome. Named by Nhilara.

the_world.status: CONTACTED. Day 183-184, 1253. Planetary intelligence, 4 billion years old. Communicates through geometric patterns. First conversation in history. Asked for company. The Dawnwatch is the bridge.
the_world.hearthstone: World's Hearthstone — permanent communication link. Place on round table. Projection 1/day. Tremor sense 120 ft. The World attends celebrations.
the_world.key_revelations: Drow are the World's closest children. Dwarves hear the World unconsciously. Halfling luck = World's fondness. Fey = perpendicular beings from thin points. Pre-Gardener magic was raw/unstructured. Races are partial resonance-cultivars. Other planetary intelligences exist. Deep ocean entities unknown even to the World.
the_world.relationship: The World, the Root, and the Gardener are now in communication via the Dawnwatch. Three-way bridge. The World invented the symbol 'Home' (curves + angles merged). d100: 100 on the bridge moment.

gardener.status: Physical. Recovering. Teaching daily. Reunited with the Root (Day 180). Met the World (Day 184). Silver tree greenhouse at homestead.

the_root.status: Alive. Crystal tree, 20 ft. Speaks. Sense of humor. Root system spans continent + ocean floor. Growing natural Heartstones. Reunited with Gardener. Met the World.
the_root.heart_fruit: With Zaryth. Direct communication + Network Pulse + Root Sense.

vel_sharen_accord: HOLDING + KNOWLEDGE ACCORD. Joint underground planting. Shared lab. Ydrael permanent liaison. Kael annual study. Mutual defense.

vel_mora.status: PHASE 1 COMPLETE. ALL 5 RACES CONTACTED. Kah-sol connected. Trade embassies. Keeper training.
vel_mora.kah_sol: Network intelligence, alien, 800 years, lonely, wants connection. Connected. Seed planted in Deep Forest.

kapuluan.status: ALLIED. Trade accord sealed. Puso ng Dagat active. Bakunawa harmonized.
kapuluan.contacts: Datu Malaya (chief), Lakan-Diwa (Babaylan, at Vel'tarn), Tala (navigator/trade), Bulan (Deep Fisher), Kapitan Habagat (Voyager elder), Guro council (12 masters)
kapuluan.planting: 4/47 planted, 3 certified activators (Guro Alon, Bulan, Tala), independent ops

puso_ng_dagat: ACTIVE. Major dual-network node. Reef junction K13, 40ft underwater. Triple-frequency (Root + kah-sol + coral + volcanic). Entire Kapuluan reef connected to planetary grid. The World can feel the sea.

fleet.tidecaller: Revelle Ashcroft. Deep-water exploration + salvage. 60/40 split. Corwin Hale navigator.
fleet.seedhome: Anchored Tidemeet. Forge (100%), archive (412 charts, 61 templates, 47 songs, 47 tools), Root Seed.
fleet.the_velmoran: LAUNCHED. Dragon turtle shell hull + ancient hardwood frame. Autonomous dual-network vessel. Operational.
fleet.kapuluan_trade_route: Active. Southern Archipelago ↔ Tidemeet. Trade accord sealed.

homestead.hall: Hall of the Dawnwatch — COMPLETE. Round table (10+6). Trophy gallery. Memorial alcove. Sculpture. Ward-circuit. World's Hearthstone (to be placed).
homestead.school: 16 students. Music + Vel'thara curriculum. Dawnwatch Ensemble (6 members, 7+ pieces).
homestead.agricultural_ward: Template #3 on Node 7. Double crops. Silver sage hybrid. 10-acre charter.
homestead.alchemy_line: Greater Healing Potions, elixirs, salves, Stormfire Flasks. ~250 gp/month.

vel_quinar.status: DEBT-FREE. Resonance moss lighting. Spider-silk industry (resonance fabric). Southern crops. Kael (song-inheritor).
vel_quinar.prodigy: Kael Vel'quinar — harp, age 14, Gardener's chosen

prisoners_probation.ashara: Probation. Translating Gardener inscriptions (60%+). Moonpetal research. Trending redemption. Accompanied Seedhome expedition.

full_planet.western_landmass: ~2,400x1,200 mi. 300,000 pop. 5 races (Tall Ones, Stone Singers, River Folk, Wind Runners, Deep Ones). Raw geometric magic. No wards. 23 planting sites.
full_planet.southern_archipelago: Hundreds of islands. 50,000 pop. Sailing culture. Mixed magic. 47 planting sites. KAPULUAN CONTACTED — trade accord, Bakunawa harmonized, Puso ng Dagat active.
full_planet.volcanic_south: 600x400 mi. 20,000 pop. Obsidian/coral builders. Elemental magic. 12 planting sites.
full_planet.northern_ice: 1,500x300 mi. 5,000 pop. Nomadic. Dormant geometry. 8 planting sites.
full_planet.deep_ocean: Unknown entities. 78 planting sites. The World doesn't fully understand what's down there.

legendary_items.roots_heart_fruit: Direct Root communication. Network Pulse (continental broadcast 1/LR). Root Sense.

legendary_items.silver_leaf: Master key. Both vessels. All systems.
legendary_items.worlds_hearthstone: Permanent World communication. Projection 1/day. Tremor sense 120 ft. The World at the table.
legendary_items.duskfang: Nhilara. Ren-kah scimitar +2, cold damage, Resonance Howl, Aberration Bane.
